arts.ttl: When is Man City - Man United? how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Their recent form hasn’t been great with a 2-2 draw against Crystal Palace, a 3-0 victory over Nottingham Forest, and a 0-2 loss to Liverpool . The game between Man City - Man United will be played on Sunday December 15 at Ethihad Stadium with kick off at 11:30 a.m. ET / 8:30 a.m. PT .

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola rules out managing another club after Manchester City
arts.sum: Guardiola interested in international coaching role ‘I’m going to stop. I am not going to join another team’ Pep Guardiola has ruled himself out of managing another club after Manchester City due to a waning of his energy levels, stating an international coaching position would be of interest to him as his next role. Guardiola signed a new contract with the champions in November until summer 2026 that will extend his tenure to a decade. The 53-year-old is yet to decide if he will depart then but, whenever he does, Guardiola has said he will not take charge of a club side again. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'Promised change, but Juventus are back in crisis'
arts.sum: As Juventus prepare to host Man City in the Champions League, Italian football expert Mina Rzouki looks at why the Old Lady are back in crisis.

arts.ttl: Mourinho wants 'justice' over Man City charges
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has hit back at Pep Guardiola's claim that he wants to see Manchester City relegated to League One by saying he only wants "justice in football."

arts.ttl: Beukema: “It was difficult to say goodbye to Thiago Motta.”
arts.sum: Bologna defender Sam Beukema has opened up about former coach Thiago Motta’s departure and the recent links to Juventus in an interview with As. The 26-year-old Dutch center-back shared his thoughts on Motta’s coaching style and the team’s remarkable achievement of qualifying for the Champions League. Beukema expressed the difficulty of bidding farewell to Motta, stating, “It was hard to say goodbye to him; everyone had great respect. Look at how he made us play… During the week, he’s rather calm: he’s not very talkative and doesn’t shout. He watches more than he speaks. But when you play, he’s very The post Beukema: “It was difficult to say goodbye to Thiago Motta.” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Phil Foden, Mateo Kovacic update: Pep Guardiola reveals if Man City duo will play against Juventus
